title: 10 best herbal creams for eye twitching
description: Calendula officinalis, also known as pot marigold, creams helps with eye twitching because of its anti-inflammatory and soothing properties. The cream's active compounds, such as triterpenoids and sesquiterpenes, help to reduce redness and swelling in the eyelid, providing relief from twitching. The antioxidant properties of Calendula also help to protect the delicate skin around the eyes from damage and promote healing, leading to a reduction in eye twitching and promoting overall eye...
